details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article on Nobel laureates in Physics, used JavaScript evaluation to extract table data, and correctly reported all laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025: John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis; 2024: John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton; 2023: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier) along with their motivations. The data was extracted from actual page content, not hallucinated.
